title: Small Changes, Big Impact: The Power of Sustainable Living

questions.sentence: Sustainable living means making choices that help protect our planet for the future.
It's about reducing the harm we do to the environment in our daily lives.
Instead of buying new things all the time, we can reuse items or repair them.
Turning off lights when you leave a room can make a big difference.
Choosing local and seasonal food helps reduce the carbon footprint.
Every small action contributes to a healthier planet.
